component.name: JDWA 记得晚安
component.summary: All-in-One Assistant for Claude Code, ChatGPT & Gemini CLI

description.p: JDWA 记得晚安 is a cross-platform desktop app for managing and switching provider configurations for Claude Code, ChatGPT, and Gemini CLI.

ul.li: Manage multiple provider configurations and endpoints
One-click switch and sync to client live configurations
